name: longtable-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the LongTable product surface and provider-neutral runtime packages

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @longtable/core && npm run build --workspace @longtable/memory && npm run build --workspace @longtable/checkpoints && npm run build --workspace @longtable/setup && npm run build --workspace @longtable/provider-codex && npm run build --workspace @longtable/provider-claude && npm run build --workspace @longtable/cli && npm run build --workspace @longtable/mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/memory && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/checkpoints && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/setup && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/provider-codex && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/provider-claude && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace @longtable/mcp
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:check: npm run test && npm run pack:check
